text: Planning a trip is always an exciting experience. A few years ago, I decided to visit Japan. Before going, I researched popular destinations, booked hotels, and learned a few basic phrases. When I arrived, everything was different from my home country. The food was amazing—I tried fresh sushi, warm ramen, and sweet mochi. However, language barriers were a challenge; sometimes I had to use hand gestures or a translation app to communicate. Despite this, the new culture fascinated me, from the polite customs to the beautiful temples. These travel experiences created unforgettable memories that I still cherish today.
